debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
⊢ Tendsto (fun k => k * Real.sinh (r / k)) atTop (nhds r)

proof:
have inv_tends : Tendsto (·⁻¹ : ℝ → ℝ) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) := by
    apply tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within _ tendsto_inv_atTop_zero
    filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk
    exact inv_ne_zero hk.ne'
  have h := (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp inv_tends
  refine h.congr ?_
  intro k
  rw [Function.comp_apply, div_eq_mul_inv r k, div_eq_mul_inv _ k⁻¹, inv_inv]
  exact mul_comm _ k
successful_attempts:

    filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk
    exact inv_ne_zero hk.ne'
  have h := (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp inv_tends
  refine h.congr ?_
  intro k
  rw [Function.comp_apply, div_eq_mul_inv r k, div_eq_mul_inv _ k⁻¹, inv_inv]
